title: 日本ダービーの後に・0

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My fate has changed. The seven-centimeter gap
is no longer an impediment.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Parcae keeps producing errors. My chances of
winning beyond the Kikuka Sho are now unclear.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
The 991031021222 integer has disappeared.
Reason for its appearance and subsequent
disappearance is currently unknown.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My next goal is the Kikuka Sho. I will continue
training to meet my target values. */
